plot_001.notes: Inherited land, no title deed, community-recognised ownership under Nandi customary law

plot_002.notes: Formal title deed registered with National Land Commission

plot_003.notes: 99-year lease from County Government of Mombasa; Arabic land records also exist

plot_004.notes: Maasai community land; Group Ranch registration pending under Community Land Act 2016

plot_005.notes: Urban plot in informal settlement, title formalised under Nairobi slum upgrading programme

summary.legal_framework: Land Registration Act 2012, Community Land Act 2016, Trust Land Act Cap 288
